race.comment: MY MATE ELVIS (4) backed up his close finish in town with a dominant win here last start over 1400m. The rise to the mile suits and he can keep the ball rolling. HEART BALM (2) has put two dominant wins on the bounce here and looks the main danger. Keeps the claimer on to help the big weight and has enough dash to offset the wide alley. Expecting him to push forward again. MIDNIGHT AFFAIR (13) caught the eye here last start when flashing home from the rear into second behind HEART BALM, who she meets with a good weight swing. Chance to turn the tables. WINGS OF CARMEN (1) will find this a bit easier but has to lug the weight. Rates highly on best figures and gets the key booking of Loy. Not dismissing.
